Spring Data Couchbase
  1. org.springframework.data.couchbase.core.support

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.couchbase.core.support.OneAndAllEntity

Packages that use OneAndAllEntity
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.couchbase.core
This package contains the specific implementations and core classes for Spring Data Couchbase internals.

  • Uses of OneAndAllEntity in org.springframework.data.couchbase.core

    ExecutableInsertByIdOperation.ExecutableInsertById<T>
    Provides methods for constructing KV insert operations in a fluent way.

    Fluent method to specify the collection.
